title: The Crown Princess's Son Just Got 4 Years for Rape
script: Her son got 4 years! Norway's Crown Princess Mette-Marit has had a rough week. Her eldest son, Marius Borg Høiby — 27 years old, from before her marriage to Crown Prince Haakon — was found guilty Monday at Oslo District Court of 2 counts of rape. He was originally charged with 4. Acquitted of 2. Found guilty of 2 — plus domestic violence, violent threats, and filming people without their consent. He got 4 years in prison and was ordered to pay about $61,000 in damages to the 4 women who accused him. The Norwegian royal house issued a statement calling it a 'difficult time for all involved.' Marius himself had previously admitted to breaking a restraining order and drug offenses. So what does the Norwegian royal family do when one of their own gets convicted of rape?
